name: Twitter Ads (X Ads)
description: The X (Twitter) Ads API lets you programmatically create, manage, and measure advertising campaigns on the X platform. Manage campaigns, line items, creatives, promoted posts, audience targeting, funding instruments, and pull analytics reports.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all ad accounts accessible by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific ad account.

capabilities.name: campaigns_list
capabilities.description: List all campaigns for an ad account.

capabilities.name: campaigns_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific campaign by ID.

capabilities.name: campaigns_create
capabilities.description: Create a new campaign with objective, budget, and schedule.

capabilities.name: campaigns_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a campaign by ID.

capabilities.name: line_items_list
capabilities.description: List all line items (ad groups) for a campaign.

capabilities.name: line_items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new line item with bid, optimization goal, and targeting.

capabilities.name: line_items_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing line item.

capabilities.name: line_items_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a line item by ID.

capabilities.name: promoted_tweets_list
capabilities.description: List promoted tweets associated with a line item.

capabilities.name: promoted_tweets_create
capabilities.description: Promote a tweet by associating it with a line item.

capabilities.name: promoted_tweets_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a promoted tweet.

capabilities.name: targeting_criteria_list
capabilities.description: List targeting criteria for a line item.

capabilities.name: targeting_criteria_create
capabilities.description: Add targeting criteria to a line item.

capabilities.name: targeting_criteria_delete
capabilities.description: Remove targeting criteria from a line item.

capabilities.name: analytics_query
capabilities.description: Retrieve performance analytics for campaigns, line items, or promoted tweets.

capabilities.name: tailored_audiences_list
capabilities.description: List all custom (tailored) audiences.

capabilities.name: tailored_audiences_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tailored audience for targeting.

capabilities.name: funding_instruments_list
capabilities.description: List funding instruments (payment methods) for an ad account.
